policy: Use when an immutable historical Atlas report predates explicit corpus-count fields. Explicit report values normally win. An audited override may set authoritative=true only when the immutable legacy report itself is proven incorrect. Never substitute current corpus totals for a historical snapshot.

media-analysis-all-f5fdcae2c78b-v1.reason: This image-only Atlas report predates metadata_video_samples, while the published historical README recorded the complete source corpus as 937 images and 40 videos.

media-analysis-all-8b850904b063-v1.reason: This legacy full-corpus Atlas report predates explicit image/video corpus-count fields; the immutable historical summary recorded 937 images and 40 videos.

media-analysis-2026-07-13-v1.reason: The immutable legacy report itself used a polluted global image count. The source Release, the original historical table, and the three comparable entries establish the correct snapshot as 3 images and 1 video.
